scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true});require('fs').rmSync('../../node_modules/.cache/jue/compiler',{recursive:true,force:true})" && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --external:@jue/runtime-core --external:@jue/shared --outfile=dist/index.js --sourcemap && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --external:@jue/runtime-core --external:@jue/shared --minify --outfile=dist/index.min.js && esbuild src/frontend/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --external:@jue/runtime-core --external:@jue/shared --outfile=dist/frontend/index.js --sourcemap && esbuild src/frontend/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --external:@jue/runtime-core --external:@jue/shared --minify --outfile=dist/frontend/index.min.js && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
